name: Debt Consolidation US
description_short: Debt Consolidation US offers free debt consolidation and credit card consolidation services in Miami, Florida, connecting consumers with debt professionals to reduce payments and avoid bankruptcy.
description_long: Debt Consolidation US operates a lead-generation platform focused on debt relief services, specifically targeting consumers in Miami, Florida and across the United States. The company markets free debt help and consolidation programs to individuals struggling with credit card debt and multiple creditors. Their primary service model involves collecting consumer information through online forms and connecting qualified leads with debt professionals who can negotiate on their behalf. The platform emphasizes accessibility by offering completely free initial consultations and assistance, with no upfront costs mentioned for the assessment process. What distinguishes Debt Consolidation US is their geographic targeting strategy—offering localized Miami/Florida-specific pages while maintaining national reach across all 50 states. They position themselves as advocates for people avoiding bankruptcy, offering what appears to be a matching or referral service rather than directly providing debt settlement or consolidation loans. The company collects extensive consumer data including debt amount ranges (from $10,000 to over $100,000), state location, and contact information to facilitate connections. However, a critical caveat is that the website content is sparse on specifics regarding actual outcomes, fee structures post-consultation, debt reduction percentages, or timeframes. The fine print reveals that submitted information is shared with "CuraDebt Systems, LLC" for counseling, indicating this operates as a lead aggregator rather than a direct service provider. Consumer protection-conscious shoppers should note that the website lacks details about licensing, certifications, NFCC affiliation status, or regulatory compliance information.
pros: Advertises completely FREE initial debt relief consultation with no upfront fees mentioned
Serves all 50 states plus D.C., providing broad geographic accessibility
Offers state-specific landing pages (Miami/Florida) with localized messaging
Simple online form-based intake process requiring minimal time commitment
Targets multiple debt amount ranges ($10K-$100K+) to serve various consumer situations
Emphasizes debt-free living and bankruptcy avoidance as primary goals
24/7 online access to submit debt relief inquiry forms
Direct phone line provided (855-714-4721) for immediate consultation requests
cons: Website lacks transparency on actual debt settlement rates, average savings percentages, or success metrics
No information provided about company licensing, certifications (NFCC), or regulatory status
Operates as a lead generator connected to CuraDebt Systems, LLC—unclear who actually provides the consolidation services
Website contains minimal details about fee structures, whether companies charge after initial consultation, or cost models
No specific information about timeframes for debt reduction, payment plans, or expected monthly payment reductions
best_for: Miami and Florida residents with $10K-$100K+ in credit card debt seeking consolidation options
Consumers overwhelmed by multiple creditors who want free initial guidance before committing
Debt-burdened individuals seeking to avoid bankruptcy and explore settlement alternatives
People across all 50 states wanting to submit debt information anonymously online without phone calls first
diagnosis: Debt Consolidation US is best for consumers in any state with $10K-$100K in consolidated debt seeking free initial guidance without upfront payment, particularly those wanting to avoid bankruptcy. The critical caveat is that this company operates as a lead-generation platform connecting you to external debt professionals (CuraDebt Systems, LLC) rather than directly providing consolidation services—always clarify actual provider credentials, fees, and licensing before committing.
services: Free debt relief consultations and assessments
Debt consolidation loan inquiries and referrals
Online debt relief inquiry form submission
Lead matching with debt management professionals
